name: zombie_rider.live_no_camp_light_control_mcw
description: Live camp-light negative-control rider row: same mature-world/two-rider footing as the positive camp-light row, but no staged fire fields. The bounded live window must not emit the bandit horde-light signal or zombie-rider camp-light convergence trace.

steps.label: post_load_rider_no_camp_light_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged mature-world no-camp-light rider control fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_mature_before_rider_no_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected mature-world midnight turn before no-camp-light control window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight in a mature-world turn window before the no-camp-light control

steps.label: audit_saved_no_human_npcs_before_rider_no_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save still contained overmap NPC human targets before the no-camp-light control window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-overmap metadata proves no NPC human target can substitute for the no-light setup

steps.label: audit_saved_zombie_riders_before_no_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain the two required rider footing records
steps.expected_visible_fact: two hostile zombie riders start on the same footing as the positive camp-light row

steps.label: audit_saved_no_fire_fields_before_rider_no_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save still had fd_fire at a positive-row camp-light source offset
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-map metadata proves the positive-row camp-light offsets contain no fd_fire sources before live turns advance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_rider_no_camp_light
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded no-camp-light window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_rider_no_camp_light_control_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window matches the positive camp-light cadence duration while no staged camp-light source exists

steps.label: audit_zombie_rider_no_camp_light_no_band_trace
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact contained camp-light rider convergence or horde-light signal despite the no-light control setup
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact contains no camp-light rider convergence, no horde-light signal, and no band/circle-harass posture without staged camp lights

evidence_contract.claim: with the same mature-world/two-rider footing as the positive camp-light row, absence of camp-light fields produces no live horde-light signal and no zombie-rider camp-light convergence/band posture
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses harness-only game_turn, remove-overmap-NPC, and active_monsters save transforms plus saved-turn/NPC/rider/no-fire audits before live turns; it proves the no-light control for the live source hook, not natural stealth, persistent rider travel, or full camp defense
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for zombie-rider no-camp-light control behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live source-hook absence from same-run artifacts; persistent overmap migration/camp assault remains future-only unless promoted.
